definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="randomCoords">randomCoords</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="31" y="-34"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:randomCoords</field><value name="VAL"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MULTIPLY</field><value name="A"><block type="math_java_constants"><field name="CONSTANT">RANDOM</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">10</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="spawn_particle_multi" inline="false"><field name="particle">CUSTOM:AsgardPortalParticles</field><value name="count"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="dx"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:randomCoords</field></block></value><value name="dy"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:randomCoords</field></block></value><value name="dz"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:randomCoords</field></block></value><value name="speed"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
